title: What to know about hypertension before using medicinal herbs
intro: Hyssop tea, rich in antioxidants and anti-inflammatory properties, effectively lowers blood pressure. This herbal tea relaxes blood vessels, improving circulation and overall cardiovascular health. Combine hyssop with other blood pressure-lowering herbs, such as hawthorn and yarrow, for a powerful, soothing, caffeine-free blend. Regularly drinking this potent tea helps maintain normal blood pressure levels, contributing to a healthier lifestyle.
definition: Hypertension, also known as high blood pressure, is a long-term health condition characterized by consistently elevated forces of blood against the walls of the arteries. This ongoing pressure exerts significant stress on the cardiovascular system, leading to potential complications such as heart disease, stroke, and kidney damage. Given its asymptomatic nature, regular monitoring of blood pressure is essential to ensure early detection and management, ultimately contributing to improved overall health and longevity.
